query:
OK.. issue 469 complete. Summary: BUG FIX COMPLETE — PR ready for review.

  PR: https://github.com/dug-21/unimatrix/pull/470
  Branch: bugfix/469-informs-empty-feature-cycle

  Fix Summary:
  - Root cause: Three guard sites used is_empty() || — blocking any Informs candidate
  where either entry lacked a feature_cycle, which was never the design intent
  - Site 1 (~line 293): pre-filter removed entirely
  - Site 2 (~line 770): two-block guard collapsed to single explicit predicate
  !src.is_empty() && !tgt.is_empty() && src == tgt
  - Site 3 (~line 801): updated to handle newly-reachable both-empty path (the
  critical correctness fix after Sites 1 & 2 relaxed)
  - Comments updated at lines 83 and 747 to prevent re-introduction
  - Impact: All 16 convention entries and 71 decision entries without feature_cycle
  now eligible for Informs detection

  New tests: 4 AC-15 variants added — source-empty, target-empty, both-empty (Site 3
  path), same-non-empty-blocked (preserved)

  Tests: 4262 unit pass, 22/22 smoke pass, 13/13 contradiction suite pass

  Gate: Bugfix Validation — PASS
  Security Review: low risk — no blocking findings\
Sec review: Security Review — PASS

Summary: low risk — no blocking findings
Merge readiness: READY
Findings (non-blocking):

Phase 8 cap-break ordering dependency — implicit ordering invariant not commented at break site
debug_assert! for weight finitude elided in release — belt-and-suspenders guard suggested
Verified clean: SQL injection (none), async contamination (none), domain vocab isolation (AC-22 pass), FR-11 mutual exclusion (closed), config validation correct, no new dependencies, no secrets.

entries.title: Cross-feature guard over-restriction: is_empty() OR blocks entries with unknown provenance
High Compile Cycles Signal Need for Targeted Test Invocations
